title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Statistical Models by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Splines
steps.summary: Splines belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with Gaussianization and Quantile Huber. It opens into Multivariate Adaptive Regression Splines (MARS) and smoothing splines.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Quantile Huber
steps.summary: Quantile Huber belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Tree-Based Models. Start after Huber. It opens into Quantile Huber GBM and Quantile Huber Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Gaussianization
steps.summary: Gaussianization belongs to the Statistical Models area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Statistical Models / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with Quantile Gaussianization and Splines. It opens into Quantile Gaussianization.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Quantile Gaussianization
